purpose: Decide which character folders must be loaded for one scene_contract.

selection_priority.condition: character is physically in the current location or explicitly nearby and able to observe/hear
character speaks in the last turn, is expected to answer, or is currently addressed
last_user_turn or active NPC directly addresses this character
character is mentioned and the mention changes action, emotion, decision, risk, or knowledge in this scene
scene_goal is about this character, their duty, their order, their arrival, their absence, or their consequences
a selected relationship pair cannot be interpreted without this character's current memory
current calendar slice explicitly activates this character now

do_not_select_character_when: character only exists in the broader cast but has no current scene role
character appears only in hidden past and past trigger is absent
character is important to the story globally but absent from this scene
character is a future arrival not yet reached by current date/time
character is only part of an unrelated relationship pair

load_akira_when: Akira speaks, acts, is addressed, observed, followed, or directly discussed
a relevant relationship pair with Akira is selected for this scene
do_not_load_akira_when: pov is another character and Akira is absent
Akira is not mentioned with current scene relevance
the scene is about another character's work, private conflict, duty, relationship, or location
only broad canon or protagonist status would justify loading her

load_reason: pov | physically_present | speaking | directly_addressed | mentioned_with_relevance | scene_goal_requires | relationship_pair_requires | calendar_requires
source_files: characters/<id>/past.yaml only if allowed by past_trigger_rules
